TARGETS=badtoken
RC=1
ERROR: converge_target_envs: malformed target token 'badtoken' (expected -target=module.NAME)
---
TARGETS=-target=module.unknownrole
RC=1
ERROR: converge_target_envs: unrecognized module 'unknownrole' in TOFU_TARGETS
